Configuration.Name: ALMA_NCIP_Lending_Client
Configuration.Author: Bill Jones, SUNY Geneseo; Kurt Munson, Northwestern University Libraries (Modified by Matt Niehoff) (Holds Modifications by Robert Wilson)
Configuration.Description: Communicates with Alma via NCIP to move Lending requests. Optionally cancels internal Alma holds before checkout.

Setting.name: NCIP_Responder_URL
Setting.Description: Replace "xxx" with your institution's three letter Alma code.

Setting.name: Alma_API_URL
Setting.Description: The base URL for the Alma REST API.

Setting.name: Alma_API_Key
Setting.Description: Alma API Key with Read/Write permissions for Bibs/Requests.

Setting.name: Cancel_Alma_Hold_Before_Checkout
Setting.Description: If true, the addon will attempt to cancel an internal Alma hold (found in the field below) before sending the NCIP checkout.

Setting.name: Alma_Hold_ID_Field
Setting.Description: The Transaction field where the Alma Request ID is stored (e.g. "Created 12345").

Setting.name: acceptItem_from_uniqueAgency_value
Setting.Description: Replace "XXX" with your institution's three letter Alma code.

Setting.name: ApplicationProfileType
Setting.Description: Input the Resource Sharing Partner code used in Alma.

Setting.name: ILLiad_field_to_get_barcode
Setting.Description: This field will be used as the item barcode to be sent to Alma.

Setting.name: LendingCheckOutItemFailQueue
Setting.Description: Queue for Lending Transactions if CheckOutItem fails.

Setting.name: LendingCheckInItemFailQueue
Setting.Description: Queue for Lending Transactions if CheckInItem fails.
